india gdp.title: India GDP reaches new heights in recent estimates
india gdp.snippet: According to the latest global economic reports, the GDP of India currently stands at approximately 4.15 trillion USD, showcasing robust economic growth across multiple manufacturing and service sectors.

india gdp.title: List of countries by GDP (nominal) - Wikipedia
india gdp.snippet: India is currently the 5th largest economy in the world. As of recent estimates, India's GDP is 4.15 trillion USD. The United States remains first.

usa gdp.title: United States Economy and GDP Data
usa gdp.snippet: The latest economic analysis reported today that the USA GDP is estimated at 31.8 trillion USD. This represents a solid increase from the previous quarter.
